EXPLANATION: The paper exists on arXiv (arXiv:2601.12538) with the exact title "Agentic Reasoning for Large Language Models" and an author list that precisely matches all 29 cited authors, including Tianxin Wei, Ting-Wei Li, Zhining Liu, and all others through Jingrui He. The cited title uses a minor subtitle variant ("A survey" vs. the arXiv primary title without subtitle), but the content and authorship are identical.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.12538
FOUND_TITLE: Agentic Reasoning for Large Language Models
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianxin Wei, Ting-Wei Li, Zhining Liu, Xuying Ning, Ze Yang, Jiaru Zou, Zhichen Zeng, Ruizhong Qiu, Xiao Lin, Dongqi Fu, Zihao Li, Mengting Ai, Duo Zhou, Wenxuan Bao, Yunzhe Li, Gaotang Li, Cheng Qian, Yu Wang, Xiangru Tang, Yin Xiao, Liri Fang, Hui Liu, Xianfeng Tang, Yuji Zhang, Chi Wang, Jiaxuan You, Heng Ji, Hanghang Tong, Jingrui He
FOUND_YEAR: 2026
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
